email-newsletter.title: WalkScape | Substack
email-newsletter.description: WalkScape is a game inspired by good ol' RuneScape. But this game has one major trick up its sleeve: you don't play actively, but instead gain progress by walking. Click to read WalkScape, a Substack publication with thousands of subscribers.
